text.title: Value Stream Management Worked Example
text.summary: One full `ValueStreamReport` for the checkout stream over a 90-day window, surfacing the design-review constraint with three ranked experiments.

example.title: Checkout stream — 90-day window, design-review constraint
example.note: Customer-anchored start/end; full four work types each >= 50 sample; DORA split human/bot; tier_label backed by 3 quarters; constraint with evidence prose; 3 ranked experiments with cost.
